title: Structural Engineer Intern, Transmission Line
mainText:
Black & Veatch
Engineering & Construction
Structural Engineer Intern, Transmission Line
Posted 3 months ago∙Apply by April 30, 2026 at 9:59 PM
Save
Share
Apply externally
At a glance
$18.99–35.51/hr
Onsite, based in Phoenix, AZ, Denver, CO, +2
Work in person from one of the locations
Internship
Full-time∙From May 18, 2026 to August 7, 2026
US work authorization required
Job description

Job Summary

As a Structural Engineer (Transmission Line) Summer Intern at Black & Veatch, you will play a meaningful role in addressing some of the world’s most critical infrastructure challenges. This internship offers the opportunity to contribute to diverse, impactful projects that support our clients’ goals while fostering your professional growth and advancing the success of Black & Veatch.

 

Chosen candidates will be located in/or relocate to Denver (CO), Phoenix (AZ), Sacramento (CA) or Tualatin (OR).

Key Responsibilities

Support development of design specifications and contract drawings
Perform variety of tasks to support engineering analyses, report production, and designs
Prepare basic calculations 
Analyze systems utilizing computer modeling
Organize and file project materials and references

Preferred Qualifications

Analytical skills
Communications skills, both written and oral
Initiative
Self-starter, highly motivated
Attention to detail
Mathematical skills
Problem solving skills

Minimum Qualifications

No experience required. Current enrollment in ABET accredited university in Civil Engineering program with a preferred emphasis in Structural Engineering. Preference in coursework is at least 1 design course.  All applicants must be able to complete pre-employment onboarding requirements (if selected) which may include any/all of the following: criminal/civil background check, drug screen, and motor vehicle records search, in compliance with any applicable laws and regulations.

Work Environment/Physical Demands

This intern position is expected to be in the office on a full-time basis.

Competencies

Interpersonal Skills

Computer Skills

About the employer
Black & Veatch

Engineering & Construction

Follow
10,000-25,000 employees

Nationwide

At Black & Veatch we believe that our people are invaluable, and we put them at the center of everything we do. Being an employee-owned company means our people are Black & Veatch. Here you are empowered to grow and explore new possibilities at every step of your career journey. Our excellence is natured by the trust we have in each other and provide a hybrid environment to best support your personal and professional success. 
 
Here you get to lend your talent and perspective to humanity’s biggest challenges. For more than 100 years, we have been committed to delivering great work, doing what it takes to succeed, and sharing in the benefits of that success. We bring our strengths, do our best, have pride in our work, and genuinely make the world better.
 
We own careers with purpose and meaning. We own our company and our future.  Together, we own our shared success.
